# Example repository?

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

Curious if there ia an example repository for the agentic model used in this repository besides this one. I didn't see one but was curious.

**Describe the solution you'd like**

It might be interesting to see how it works against a different repository, as it seems somewhat coupled to this one at the moment.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**

None, just curious.
